news.title:
Axis Capital reports Voltas saw 11% volume rise after a 9-month decline.
El Niño heat wave expected to boost cooling product demand and market share.
news.summary:
Axis Capital reports Voltas saw 11% volume rise after a 9-month decline.
El Niño heat wave expected to boost cooling product demand and market share.

news.title:
Voltas aims for double-digit growth in summer, driven by normal temperature trends.
The company plans price hikes of 5-15% due to rising costs and revised energy norms.
news.summary:
Voltas aims for double-digit growth in summer, driven by normal temperature trends.
The company plans price hikes of 5-15% due to rising costs and revised energy norms.

news.title:
Voltas forecasts 25% growth in AC sales due to early summer demand.
Favourable weather conditions are driving the rise in cooling product demand.
news.summary:
Voltas forecasts 25% growth in AC sales due to early summer demand.
Favourable weather conditions are driving the rise in cooling product demand.

news.title: Voltas plans to raise AC prices by 5-15%, reports Zee Business.
news.summary: Voltas plans to raise AC prices by 5-15%, reports Zee Business.

news.title:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.
news.summary:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
Voltas Ltd announces resignation of Mr. Gyan Shanker Pandey, Head-Digital, effective 13th February 2026.
Resignation attributed to pursuit of opportunities outside Voltas; company assures smooth transition process.
news.summary:
Voltas Ltd announces resignation of Mr. Gyan Shanker Pandey, Head-Digital, effective 13th February 2026.
Resignation attributed to pursuit of opportunities outside Voltas; company assures smooth transition process.

news.title:
Voltas Q3 FY26 income stands at Rs. 3,120 Cr.
Market share in RAC segment rises to 17.9%.
news.summary:
Voltas Q3 FY26 income stands at Rs. 3,120 Cr.
Market share in RAC segment rises to 17.9%.

news.title:
Voltas Q3 net profit declines due to softer demand and low margins.
Price hikes in March quarter crucial amid new energy models, commodity volatility.
news.summary:
Voltas Q3 net profit declines due to softer demand and low margins.
Price hikes in March quarter crucial amid new energy models, commodity volatility.

news.title:
Voltas appoints Amit Jaiswal as Chief Internal Auditor effective 29 Jan 2026, replacing Vijayalakshmi Suresh.
Vijayalakshmi Suresh resigns to pursue external opportunities; will be relieved on 31 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
Voltas appoints Amit Jaiswal as Chief Internal Auditor effective 29 Jan 2026, replacing Vijayalakshmi Suresh.
Vijayalakshmi Suresh resigns to pursue external opportunities; will be relieved on 31 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Voltas Ltd's Q3 revenue stood at ₹3,120 crore, slightly declining YoY, with PBT at ₹116 crore and PAT at ₹84 crore.
9-month revenue declined to ₹9,552 crore from ₹10,890 crore YoY; focus remains on cooling segment and portfolio diversification.
news.summary:
Voltas Ltd's Q3 revenue stood at ₹3,120 crore, slightly declining YoY, with PBT at ₹116 crore and PAT at ₹84 crore.
9-month revenue declined to ₹9,552 crore from ₹10,890 crore YoY; focus remains on cooling segment and portfolio diversification.

news.title:
Voltas' Q3 margins surpassed expectations, offering short-term comfort despite cost and demand risks flagged by brokerages.
UCP segment profitability exceeded forecasts, leading analysts to reassess near-term margin trends.
news.summary:
Voltas' Q3 margins surpassed expectations, offering short-term comfort despite cost and demand risks flagged by brokerages.
UCP segment profitability exceeded forecasts, leading analysts to reassess near-term margin trends.

news.title:
Voltas Ltd announces Q3FY26 earnings call on 29th Jan 2026, organized by PhillipCapital India.
Key speakers include MD Mukundan Menon and CFO K V Sridhar; call details and dial-in info provided.
news.summary:
Voltas Ltd announces Q3FY26 earnings call on 29th Jan 2026, organized by PhillipCapital India.

news.title: Voltas to hold a Board meeting on 29 January 2026 to discuss results.
news.summary: Voltas to hold a Board meeting on 29 January 2026 to discuss results.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley predicts Voltas' Q3 revenue to fall 7%, contrary to 20% growth forecast.
High channel inventory levels are cited as the primary reason for the revenue decline.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley predicts Voltas' Q3 revenue to fall 7%, contrary to 20% growth forecast.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains 'Equal-Weight' on Voltas, cuts target price to Rs 1409 from Rs 1501.
Operating de-leveraging, rising commodity prices, and currency depreciation expected to pressure margins.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains 'Equal-Weight' on Voltas, cuts target price to Rs 1409 from Rs 1501.
Operating de-leveraging, rising commodity prices, and currency depreciation expected to pressure margins.

news.title:
FIIs turned net buyers of Indian consumer durables, investing $438M in December, reversing a 4-month sell-off.
Stocks like Asian Paints and Titan gained 11-25%, while Voltas and Havells fell 9-32%; valuations remain mixed.
news.summary:
FIIs turned net buyers of Indian consumer durables, investing $438M in December, reversing a 4-month sell-off.
Stocks like Asian Paints and Titan gained 11-25%, while Voltas and Havells fell 9-32%; valuations remain mixed.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty indicates a positive opening at 26,000, rising 0.12%.
Bajaj Finserv, BHEL, HUL, NHPC, Voltas, Elecon Engineering shares in focus.

news.title:
Voltas Ltd. saw a block trade of ~502,344 shares at Rs. 1,508.6.
The transaction amounted to Rs. 75.8 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jefferies raised Polycab's target to Rs 9,230, citing structural growth in cables; LG India's target trimmed to Rs 1,950 on cost pressures.
Voltas, Blue Star, and LG India forecast mid-teens FY27 sales growth; rising raw material costs and weak rupee pose margin challenges.
news.summary:
Jefferies raised Polycab's target to Rs 9,230, citing structural growth in cables; LG India's target trimmed to Rs 1,950 on cost pressures.
Voltas, Blue Star, and LG India forecast mid-teens FY27 sales growth; rising raw material costs and weak rupee pose margin challenges.
